description: Starter scaffold for real-data consolidation and lifecycle cases. Expand to 20-50 annotated cases.

cases.query: What generalized rule applies after repeated rollback failures?
cases.notes: Promote this to a real case once the source incident bundle is available.

cases.query: Which active memory should outrank fading alternatives for escalation handling?
cases.notes: Intended for state-aware recall validation on real data.
